title: Effort Picker Flow with Thinking Budget Trade-off

findings.description: EffortSelector component exists with Low/Medium/High/Max options and descriptions explaining token/thinking trade-offs
findings.evidence: EffortSelector.tsx: DEFAULT_OPTIONS array with 4 levels including descriptions about token usage and thinking depth

findings.description: EffortSelector is NOT present in the main chat input area. It only appears in Settings > Model tab, Agent Profile > Model tab, and Workflows tab. No effort picker is accessible from the chat compose view.
findings.evidence: Grep for EffortSelector usage shows only: settings/ModelTab.tsx, agent-builder/tabs/ModelTab.tsx, settings/WorkflowsTab.tsx

findings.description: The bottom status bar shows 'Normal' button but this is the Permission Mode selector (Normal/Accept Edits/Plan/Bypass), NOT the effort level selector. Users may confuse these.
